name: Timeline
description: Vertical timeline widget for displaying chronological events in IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: showDates
configOptions.label: Show Dates
configOptions.description: Display date/time information for each event

configOptions.name: alternateLayout
configOptions.label: Alternate Layout
configOptions.description: Alternate event positions (left/right) for visual variety

configOptions.name: compact
configOptions.label: Compact Mode
configOptions.description: Use compact spacing for timeline events

configOptions.name: clickable
configOptions.label: Clickable
configOptions.description: Enable click interaction on timeline events

configOptions.name: eventClicked
configOptions.label: Event Clicked
configOptions.description: Event fired when a timeline event is clicked
